prediction.reasoning: Goldman Sachs stock prediction based on historical volatility analysis. Assuming annualized volatility of ~25% typical for financial stocks, 2-day standard deviation approximately 2.1%. Point estimate assumes random walk (no drift). Confidence intervals calculated using normal distribution: 50% CI (±0.67σ), 80% CI (±1.28σ), 90% CI (±1.65σ), where σ ≈ $18.85 for 2-day period.
